event.description:
Live on January 17th at Noon EST! Learn how to chart your path on the journey to AI. Join a Crowdchat with Wikibon and IBM experts On January 17 at noon EST to learn about AI-related technologies and get a preview of topics, demos and sessions at Think 2019.

https://ibm.co/ThinkCrowdChat

This event is Eastern Standard Time.

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Think 2019 - Crowd Chat

meetup_name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC
